message:
test(mvcc): add D6 seqlock verification tests (bd-3wop3.6)

Add three verification tests that prove seqlock correctness and
performance characteristics for the MVCC timestamp layer:

1. test_seqlock_reader_no_lock (lock-free readers):
   - Spawns 8 concurrent reader threads
   - Verifies >100k reads in 100ms with zero lock acquisitions
   - Proves readers never contend on the internal Mutex
   - Validates the core optimization: O(1) reader scalability

2. test_seqlock_writer_blocks_readers (retry semantics):
   - Writer holds odd sequence (in-progress write)
   - Reader encounters odd sequence and must spin-retry
   - Verifies retry counter increments during writer hold
   - Proves readers correctly back off during writes

3. test_seqlock_throughput_vs_mutex (performance validation):
   - Compares 8-thread read throughput: seqlock vs Mutex<u64>
   - Asserts >5x speedup (typically 10-100x observed)
   - Validates architectural choice for timestamp distribution
   - Uses 100ms sampling windows for statistical stability

These tests verify the D6 contract: seqlock provides lock-free reads
with atomic sequence validation, enabling the MVCC layer to broadcast
commit timestamps to readers without per-read lock contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
